SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-20-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE PANIFILO ARMAS, FOREMAN FOR PETER MURRAY, DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY, AND DEFENDANT CHARLENE KASSELS. ANDREW KASSELS, A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN AN MEDIATION SESSION THIS MORNING WHICH WAS UNSUCCESSFUL. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
